title: clematis alpina subsp. occidentalis
intro: Clematis alpina subsp. occidentalis is a subspecies of the alpine clematis plant, a flowering vine native to the western regions of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The roots of Clematis alpina subsp. occidentalis contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
